markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's proposed content strategy and topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Angle:** To compete with SEO giants like YC, CRV will use its 55-year history as a unique, proprietary angle for content. This is critical for ranking in AI search (e.g., LLMs) where specificity is highly valued.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis:** GrowthX analyzed 8 SEO-active firms, excluding 3 from CRV's list (e.g., Kleiner Perkins) that lack a strong organic presence. YC is the dominant competitor, with 800k total keywords to A16Z's 16k.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The plan uses 6 topic clusters. For competitive areas (e.g., Seed Fundraising), CRV will use its unique angle. For niche topics (e.g., VC Selection), it will target lower-volume, high-intent keywords to capture qualified leads.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [**Prioritization:** CRV will prioritize Series A content over Seed, as Series A is more strategically important for firm branding (e.g., Midas List submissions).](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)

## Topics

### Foundational Artifacts & Logistics

  - [**Foundational Artifacts:** Krista is reviewing the "Company Context" doc, providing feedback on technical nuances (e.g., "first round of financing" vs. "seed round" for DoorDash).](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**In-Person Meeting:** The Feb 5 sync will be moved to Feb 2 or 4 to align with William's SF travel and avoid an extra commute for Krista. It will be held at CRV's office.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)

### Competitor Analysis & Strategy Rationale

  - [**Competitor Selection:** GrowthX analyzed 8 firms with a strong organic presence, excluding 3 from CRV's list (e.g., Kleiner Perkins) that lack one. It added firms like Techstars and 500 Global that compete on target keywords, even if not direct business rivals.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [**Competitive Landscape:** YC is the dominant SEO competitor, with 800k total keywords vs. A16Z's 16k. GrowthX focused its YC analysis on their educational content (\~5-6k keywords) to make the comparison relevant.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [**Strategic Approach:** The strategy combines two methods:](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
      - [**Competitive Keywords:** Target high-volume terms (e.g., "pitch deck," 12k/mo search volume) using CRV's unique angle.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [**Niche Keywords:** Target lower-volume, high-intent terms (e.g., "VC for first-time founders," \~70-150/mo search volume) to capture qualified leads.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)

### Proposed Topic Clusters

  - [**1. Seed Fundraising (Investor Perspective)**](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
      - [**Challenge:** YC dominates this space.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Use CRV's 55-year history as a unique angle.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This angle is critical for ranking in AI search (e.g., LLMs), which prioritizes specificity and proprietary data. Traditional SEO will be a longer-term effort.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [**2. VC Selection & Due Diligence**](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** A niche with low competition.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Target lower-volume, high-intent keywords (e.g., "recommended VCs for first-time founders") to capture qualified leads.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This content serves the middle-to-bottom of the funnel, reaching founders actively seeking a VC.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Krista:**](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

      - [Finalize Series A vs. Seed content prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Send the "calibration article" to Krista.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Reschedule the Feb 5 sync with Alexis for Feb 2 or 4.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
      - [Reconvene at 12:30 PM Pacific today to review the remaining topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/M9XTzNjtY97dtHWzPa_5siWsp2JSjhc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
